summary: This topic explains how to apply defined concession groups to individual students. It covers applying pre-configured concessions and the process for applying manual concessions, including distributing amounts across fee heads and handling cases where fees are already paid.
steps: Navigate to 'Student List' and select the desired student.
From the displayed list of concession groups, select the appropriate concession (e.g., 'Staff Card Concession' or 'Manual Concession').
If applying a pre-configured concession (e.g., Staff Card), the system will automatically apply the defined percentage or flat amount.
The system will show editable fields for fee heads.
Enter the desired concession amount for each fee head.
Optionally, use the 'Push' button to distribute a total concession amount across multiple fee heads, respecting the available demand in each.
Optionally, 'Upload File' (e.g., application document) related to the concession.
business_rules: If a concession is applied after the student's fees have already been fully paid, the concession amount will be recorded as 'extra fee' in the system.
The 'Push' functionality for manual concessions will distribute the amount across fee heads, but will not exceed the demand available in any single fee head.
important_notes: The list of available concessions is populated from the 'Concession Group' setup.
Manual concessions provide flexibility to assign varying amounts based on specific student cases.
The system will prompt for confirmation if applying a concession to a student whose fees are already received, explaining that the amount will be treated as extra fee.
questions: How do I apply a concession to a specific student?
What happens if I apply a concession after a student has paid their fees?
How does the 'Push' option work when applying a manual concession?
Can I upload supporting documents when applying a concession?
Where can I see the list of available concessions when applying them to a student?
